findings.title: resolveThemeColor called on render path — stale initial labelColor
findings.current: const labelColor = resolveThemeColor(...) called during render, baked into SigmaContainer settings
findings.expected: Use hardcoded fallback hex, defer live resolution to ThemeObserver

findings.title: 8-digit hex colors passed to sigma WebGL may not render correctly
findings.current: resolveDimColors() appends 2-digit hex alpha (e.g. #30363d15) — sigma WebGL support not verified
findings.expected: Convert to rgba() string or verify sigma supports 8-digit hex

findings.title: resolveThemeColor + alpha suffix may produce invalid color if resolved value is not hex
findings.current: resolveThemeColor('--foreground') + '60' — could produce 'rgba(...)60' if CSS var resolves to non-hex
findings.expected: Add hex format guard before appending alpha suffix

findings.title: getDimColor/resolveDimColors append alpha without hex validation — same hazard as CSS-003
findings.current: Blindly concatenates alphaSuffix to resolved --border value
findings.expected: Add hex guard like getSigmaBackground does

findings.title: color-mix() in GraphSearch spotlight — no Safari <16.2 fallback
findings.expected: Add non-color-mix fallback or use opacity approach

findings.title: color-mix() in LocalGraphWidget — no Safari <16.2 fallback
findings.expected: Add plain fallback or use opacity/rgba

findings.title: Static hardcoded dark-theme edge/node defaults in SigmaContainer — flash on light mode
findings.expected: Use resolveThemeColor with hex guard for initial values

findings.title: graph.css uses --background and --border without fallback values
findings.current: var(--border) and var(--background) with no fallback

findings.title: getSigmaBackground imported but unused in GraphView.tsx
findings.current: import { resolveThemeColor, getSigmaBackground } — getSigmaBackground never called

Typography dark-mode selector inconsistent with global.css custom variant
